proposed_relations.description: Claim about SBS time savings components stated during Webster Avenue SBS CAC meeting

evidence_refs.source_quote: Mr. Orosz responded that time savings come from a combination of bus lanes, traffic signal priority and off-board fare collection.

decisions.rationale: Claim was made by Ted Orosz during the Webster Avenue SBS CAC meeting #1. The project context is Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (project_12-webster-ave).

evidence_refs.source_quote: Mr. Orosz responded that time savings come from a combination of bus lanes, traffic signal priority and off-board fare collection.

proposed_relations.description: Offset bus lane suggested as potential solution for Webster Avenue SBS

evidence_refs.source_quote: a potential solution may be to implement an offset bus lane, so that bus lanes do not consume the valuable curbspace.

evidence_refs.source_quote: a potential solution may be to implement an offset bus lane, so that bus lanes do not consume the valuable curbspace.

proposed_relations.description: Claim about congestion on Webster Avenue near E. 180th Street and Cross Bronx Expressway

evidence_refs.source_quote: Webster Avenue, in the vicinity of E. 180th Street, often becomes backed up, especially during rush hour, due to congestion caused by traffic entering and exiting the Cross Bronx Expressway.

decisions.rationale: Claim explicitly names Webster Avenue. Corridor 'corridor_webster-avenue-bronx-2012' is the canonical Webster Avenue corridor record from this source.

proposed_relations.description: First CAC meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project on February 6, 2012

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Monday, February 6, 2012, The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the first Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project at Lincoln Hospital in the Bronx.

decisions.rationale: The event is explicitly described as the first CAC meeting for the Webster Avenue SBS project. Links to project_12-webster-ave via has_timeline_event.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On Monday, February 6, 2012, The New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT), held the first Community Advisory Committee (CAC) meeting for the Webster Avenue Select Bus Service (SBS) project at Lincoln Hospital in the Bronx.
Monday February 6, 2012, 6:30-8pm Lincoln Hospital Auditorium 234 East 149 th St, Bronx, NY 10451
